title: Extreme Weather Shelters - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search 2 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF SEVERE WEATHER MARION COUNTY EMERGENCY MANAGEMENT MARION COUNTY SEVERE WEATHER SHELTER LOCATOR Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides information on warming centers during a severe weather event. May offer additional warming resources. Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Warming centers operate during the winter months and during severe weather advisories. Locations are open either throughout the winter season or when temperature thresholds are met. (503) 391-7294 Visit Website More Details SEVERE WEATHER MARION COUNTY STAYTON COMMUNITY CENTER OVERNIGHT WINTER WARMING SHELTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers overnight shelter when temperatures reach 32 degrees or below. 400 W Virginia Street Stayton, OR 97383 Eligibility: Adults age 18 and older Hours: Open January 19-January 23, 2026 Monday/Wednesday/Friday 6pm-8am, Tuesday/Thursday 8pm-8am Get Directions Visit Website More Details SEVERE WEATHER MARION COUNTY OVERNIGHT WINTER WARMING SHELTER
